data.title: Fusemachines starts 9th year of AI Fellowship Program, admitting 100 fellows from varied backgrounds and areas.
data.description: In New York on February 17, 2026, Fusemachines Inc. unveiled the initiation of the 9th year of its renowned AI Fellowship Program. Recognized as a top provider of enterprise AI solutions, Fusemachines joyfully introduces the incoming group of 100 fellows from various backgrounds and regions into the program. The Company trades under the ticker symbol FUSE on the NASDAQ stock exchange.

data.title: VTAK buys 19.98% stake in AI aviation firm Fly Flyte. Gains access to revenue-generating air mobility sector pre-eVTOL boom.
data.description: Positioned ahead of the anticipated industry-wide commercialization of electric vertical takeoff and landing aircraft (eVTOL), a regional air mobility business that generates revenue from its assets is currently experiencing immediate exposure. This strategic positioning in the market is crucial as the industry gears up for future advancements in eVTOL technology.

ITALY TO TAKE PART IN THE U.S.' BOARD OF PEACE MEETING THIS WEEK

data.title: Soluna, Blockware partnership grows with 6 MW increase at Dorothy 1 - third expansion, reflecting Blockware's growth.
data.description: Albany, New York - Soluna Holdings, Inc., a company listed on NASDAQ under the symbol SLNH and specializing in green data centers for high-performance computing such as Bitcoin mining and artificial intelligence, revealed an extension to their collaboration with Blockware. The added capacity of six megawatts at Soluna’s Dorothy 1 location in western Texas represents the third expansion in their partnership. This move showcases the ongoing expansion of Blockware's activities and signals further growth opportunities for both companies in the sector.

data.title: APi Group reports record financial results for 2025 and provides initial guidance for 2026. President thanks leaders for contributions.
data.description: In New Brighton, Minnesota, APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG) announced an update on their year-end 2025 results and provided guidance for net revenue and adjusted EBITDA for 2026. Russ Becker, the President and CEO of APi, expressed gratitude to the leaders for their contributions. In 2025, the company achieved record financial results due to the successful execution of their strategy. They experienced significant organic growth and further expanded their adjusted EBITDA.

data.title: A3 partners with BBC StoryWorks to launch "Age of Automation" global film series showcasing industry transformation.
data.description: Announcing from Ann Arbor, Michigan, the Association for Advancing Automation (A3) has introduced Age of Automation, a worldwide advertising feature series partnered with BBC StoryWorks. This initiative delves into the impact of automation on various industries and global communities. The collaboration showcases original films and articles showcasing how automation is revolutionizing sectors and enhancing livelihoods internationally. Through engaging storytelling, Age of Automation sheds light on organizations leveraging automation to tackle practical issues. Stay tuned for insights on how automation is reshaping the world around us.

data.title: McFarlane Lake Mining starts trading on Frankfurt Exchange (Symbol FRA: W2Z) to expand investor awareness of Juby Gold Project.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, McFarlane Lake Mining Limited (referred to as "McFarlane" or the "Company") announced its commencement of trading on the Frankfurt Exchange under the symbol FRA: W2Z. The Company's stock is listed on the Canadian Securities Exchange (CSE: MLM), OTC Markets (OTC: MLMLF), and now on the Frankfurt Exchange. This move is a strategic effort by McFarlane to increase investor engagement and recognition of its main asset, the Juby Gold Project, spanning across both North America and Europe.

data.title: UnionPay cardholders can now withdraw cash at Cashzone ATMs across the UK, offering access to thousands of ATMs.
data.description: NCR Atleos Corporation (NYSE: NATL) announced today that UnionPay cardholders can now access cash at numerous Cashzone ATMs throughout the UK. This initiative coincides with the Chinese New Year festivities. UnionPay, a leading global card scheme, issues cards in 84 countries and regions, with its headquarters located in Shanghai. The partnership opens up thousands of ATMs for UnionPay users, providing greater financial flexibility during the holiday season and beyond.

data.title: Southern Michigan Bancorp, Inc. reported Q4 2025 net income of $2.9M with $12.2M for the full year, showing positive growth.
data.description: Southern Michigan Bancorp, Inc. (OTC: SOMC) reported fourth-quarter 2025 net income of $2,912,000, marking a 9.9% increase from the same period in 2024. For the full year ending December 31, 2025, the company earned $12,215,000, a 17.4% surge from 2024. Key financial metrics for the years ended December 31, 2025, included an annualized return on average assets of 0.77% and return on average equity of 10.64%. The tax equivalent net interest margin was 3.22% for 2025. Loan growth for 2025 was 14.1%, with deposits growing by 13.2% and total assets up by 13.0%. The allowance for credit losses stood at $15,553,000, making up 1.22% of loans on December 31, 2025. Non-performing loans were 0.98% of total loans in 2025, up from 0.08% in 2024. The company operates 18 offices in several Michigan counties offering various financial services. Southern Michigan Bancorp, Inc. included forward-looking statements in its statement and does not update these statements post-issuance. Full details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Portland General Electric buys $1.9 billion PacifiCorp assets in Washington, expanding with various facilities and 4,500 miles of transmission lines. CEO highlights commitment to excellence.
data.description: Portland General Electric Company has made a notable acquisition deal with PacifiCorp in Washington state, costing $1.9 billion. The agreement includes the purchase of specific generation, transmission, and utility operations, such as the Chehalis natural-gas plant (477 MW), the Goodnoe Hills wind facility (94 MW), and the Marengo I and II wind facilities (234 MW). Additionally, 4,500 miles of transmission and distribution lines across 2,700 square miles are part of the acquisition. The operations will be managed through a new subsidiary regulated by Washington Utilities and Transportation Commission. Maria Pope, the president and CEO of Portland General Electric, has highlighted the company's focus on operational excellence and customer service in this expansion. This move is anticipated to heighten Portland General Electric's long-term EPS and dividend growth, showcasing their bullish outlook on the investment.

data.title: BNB Chain introduces $88K Lunar New Year campaign with eight ecosystem initiatives, amidst $219M network outflows.
data.description: BNB Chain has introduced eight ecosystem initiatives offering $88,000 in rewards until March 3. These campaigns come at a critical time as the network faces significant liquidity outflows totaling $219 million.
